snippets.snippet: Clean rooms, friendly staff, and a nice atmosphere
I loved everything about this hotel!

favoriteFeatures.name: Airport transfer
favoriteFeatures.tooltip: Airport transfer available! Additional charges may apply. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

reviewSnippets: Clean rooms, friendly staff, and a nice atmosphere

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: 1 traveler found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.reviewComments: It should be a promo of 160k/night with really good facilities, plus a strategic location near Suzuya Mall. The room looks like the photo 👍🏻 clean, comfortable, but the downside is that the walls are a bit thin so it's not soundproof, you guys 👍🏻
comments.originalComment: Dapat promo 160k/malam dengan fasilitas yang oke banget, plus lokasi yang strategis deket suzuya mall. Kamar sesuai foto 👍🏻 bersih, nyaman, tapi minusnya temboknya agak tipis jadi tidak kedap suara yaa gais 👍🏻

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Okelah untuk harga promo dibawah 200 sudah cukup nyaman, sabun bawa sendiri. Selebih nya cukup aman dan nyaman

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Saat sampai hotel dibilang hotelnya lg penuh dan disuruh nunggu setengah jam untuk disiapkan kamarnya. padahal saya check in sudah jam set 10 malam. Amenities kamar mandj juga tidak ada, handuk baru tersedia jam 11 malam

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: It's decent according to the price, good.
comments.originalComment: Lumayan lah sesuai dengan harga good

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I loved everything about this hotel! Clean rooms, friendly staff, and a nice atmosphere

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText: Terimakasih banyak atas reviewnya!!! kami sangat senang bisa melayani anda dengan baik, kedepannya akan dibuka warung makan  Djaya abadi dengan vibes chinatown dan harga yang affordable, ditunggu bila berkunjung kembali
comments.reviewComments: Very reasonable price for the quality, clean and comfortable place.
comments.originalComment: Sangat sesuai harga dengan kualitas, Tempat bersih dan nyaman

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: 1 traveler found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.reviewComments: Hotel nya bersih dan bagus. Fasilitas nya juga lengkap. Worth it untuk harga segitu
